placeholderNotice: The dashboard headlines, health indicators, monthly update, spending comparisons, and international debt comparison were verified against ONS, OBR, IMF and HM Treasury sources in June 2026, and all source links were checked. The long-run historical series (especially pre-2010) remains a best-estimate reconstruction, and the international deficit and growth columns are illustrative — these carry their own confidence_level and notes. Re-verify before publication. See docs/UPDATING-DATA.md.

confidenceLevels.official: Taken directly from an official published release.
confidenceLevels.provisional: Official but flagged by the publisher as subject to revision.
confidenceLevels.estimated: An estimate, interpolation, or nowcast — not a published official figure.
confidenceLevels.calculated: Derived by this site from other figures (e.g. debt per person).
